# Position Specification Document

**Role:** Motion/UI Animator (G22)
**Role Family:** Art / Creative
**Seniority:** Senior
**Team:** Casual Games Studio — Art Division
**Reports To:** Art Director (Renaud Leclercq)
**Priority:** P1
**Compensation Band:** $105K–$140K base
**Document ID:** PSD-2026-G22-001
**Generated:** 2026-04-10T08:00:00Z
**Generated By:** CHRO Office (Automated Pipeline)

---

## 1. Role Justification

The Motion/UI Animator owns all animation deliverables — character rigs, UI transitions, VFX timing, and animation specs for engineering handoff. P1 hire required for Stage 2 (Prototype) animated UI and Stage 3 (Vertical Slice) character animation.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 2, 3, 5, 6

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| Competency            | Weight | Min   | Assessment           |
| --------------------- | ------ | ----- | -------------------- |
| Game Animation        | 25%    | ≥ 4/5 | Portfolio + panel    |
| UI Transitions        | 20%    | ≥ 4/5 | Animation challenge  |
| Character Rigging     | 15%    | ≥ 3/5 | Technical assessment |
| Animation Specs       | 15%    | ≥ 4/5 | Documentation review |
| VFX Timing            | 10%    | ≥ 3/5 | Portfolio            |
| Performance Awareness | 10%    | ≥ 3/5 | Technical assessment |
| Cross-Disciplinary    | 5%     | ≥ 3/5 | Panel interview      |

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 5+ years game animation experience
- 2+ shipped mobile titles with animation responsibility
- Character rigging and UI transition experience
- Animation spec documentation for engineering handoff

## 4. Compensation Structure

| Component         | Value                         |
| ----------------- | ----------------------------- |
| Base Salary       | $105K–$140K (75th pct: $122K) |
| Performance Bonus | Up to 10%                     |
| Equity            | 0.05%–0.10%                   |
| Signing Bonus     | Up to $15K                    |
| Relocation        | Up to $10K                    |

## 5. Sourcing Channels

| Channel                | Priority | Weight |
| ---------------------- | -------- | ------ |
| Supercell, King alumni | 1        | 1.5×   |
| Animation Showcase     | 2        | 1.3×   |
| Referrals from Renaud  | 3        | 1.5×   |
| LinkedIn               | 4        | 1.0×   |

## 6. Assessment Battery

| Assessment           | Format           | Duration | Weight |
| -------------------- | ---------------- | -------- | ------ |
| Portfolio Review     | Automated rubric | Async    | 25%    |
| Animation Challenge  | 48h async        | 48h      | 25%    |
| Panel Interview      | AI panel         | 45 min   | 30%    |
| Behavioral           | STAR             | 30 min   | 15%    |
| Animation Specs Case | Documentation    | 24h      | 5%     |

## 7. Success Criteria

| Milestone | Criteria                                            |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| Day 1     | Spine/Unity access, animation style guide reviewed  |
| Week 1    | First UI transition animation draft reviewed        |
| Month 1   | Complete animation spec library for engineering     |
| Month 3   | All Stage 2/3 animations complete; production-ready |

## 8. Auto-Validation

- [x] Role in headcount plan (Phase 3B, G22)
- [x] Compensation band within range
- [x] Assessment battery matches Art template
- [x] No duplicate positions

**Gate Status:** ✅ PSD generated. Proceeding to Stage 2.
